plains.name: Plains
plains.tactical: Fast movement and strong food. Good for farms and roads.

forest.name: Forest
forest.tactical: Slows armies, hides scouts, improves defense, and fuels construction.

hills.name: Hills
hills.tactical: Harder to cross but excellent for watchtowers, mines, archers, and vision.

mountains.name: Mountains
mountains.tactical: Blocks movement and line planning. Controls chokepoints.

river.name: River
river.tactical: Crossing costs movement and weakens defenders, but river valleys are fertile.

marsh.name: Marsh
marsh.tactical: Punishes heavy armies. Mireclan units ignore part of the movement cost.

ruins.name: Ancient Ruins
ruins.tactical: Can be surveyed for relics, influence, and rumors.

blight.name: Grave-blight
blight.tactical: Deadwalkers regenerate here. Living units suffer attrition if stranded.
